name: Bounce Setup
author: User-defined
concept: 3 mandatory confluences must ALL be present: oversold stochastics + candlestick reversal pattern (with next-day confirmation) + strong support. Plus factors improve conviction but are not required.

mandatory.2_candlestick_pattern: One of: Bullish Pin Bar, Bullish Engulfing, Harami, Morning Star, White Soldier. ALL require next-day confirmation candle closing above pattern high.
mandatory.3_strong_support: EMA tested 2+ times, OR Fibonacci 50%/61.8%, OR horizontal support, OR trendline support

candlestick_patterns.pin_bar: Long lower wick >= 2x body, small upper wick. Confirmation: next day closes above high
candlestick_patterns.engulfing: Prior bearish candle fully engulfed by bullish candle. Confirmation: next day closes above high
candlestick_patterns.harami: Small bullish body inside prior large bearish body. Confirmation: next day closes above high
candlestick_patterns.morning_star: Large bearish → small star → large bullish closing above midpoint. Confirmation: next day continues
candlestick_patterns.white_soldier: Large bullish candle (body > 60% of range) after a bearish candle. Confirmation: next day closes above high

plus_factors.macd: MACD (50,100,9) bullish or no bearish cross within 5 bars
plus_factors.spy_trend: SPY above 50 EMA (bullish regime) — equities only
plus_factors.trendline_support: Price at rising trendline from prior pivot lows

todo: Test on weekly for longer-term confirmation
Add equities watchlist (SPY, QQQ, AAPL, MSFT)

_recommendations: 4H outperforms Daily — 6 of 8 top performers on 4H
Best sectors: Tech (NVDA, META, TSLA, CRM, PYPL) and Consumer (DIS, MA)
Strategy works selectively — 8 strong out of 50 stocks
